name: confirm-add-service-appends-not-replaces
description: DATA-CORRUPTION regression. At WEB_CONFIRM with services=[Facials, Manicure, Pedicure, Haircuts, Massage], user says 'Add hair transformation'. Bot must APPEND 'Hair Transformation' to the existing list — NOT replace the whole list with just that one service. Earlier behavior: detectFieldEditsLLM emitted only field+value (no op), mutateWdForField did blind replace, all 5 prior services were wiped. Real tester from May 7 — bot reply was '✅ Services → *hair transformation*' and summary became 'Services: hair transformation' alone. Now LLM emits op=add and applyListOpLocal preserves the rest.
